info.name: Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Lentur
info.description: API collection for Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Lentur (Flexible Pavement Design Specification) module - Master data for flexible/asphalt pavement design specifications

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Spesifikasi Desain Lentur (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan spesifikasi desain lentur with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "spec": "Bagan Desain 3",
      "desc": "Bagan Desain 3 : Opsi Biaya Minimum dengan CTB",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 4,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Spesifikasi Desain Lentur (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan spesifikasi desain lentur without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan spesifikasi desain lentur detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "spec": "Bagan Desain 3",
  "desc": "Bagan Desain 3 : Opsi Biaya Minimum dengan CTB",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan spesifikasi desain lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "spec": "string",  // Required - Specification code/name
  "desc": "string"   // Required - Description
}
```

**Seeded Flexible Pavement Design Specifications**:

| Spec | Description | Base Layer | Surface Layer |
|------|-------------|------------|---------------|
| Bagan Desain 3 | Opsi Biaya Minimum dengan CTB | Cement Treated Base (CTB) | Asphalt |
| Bagan Desain 3A | Opsi Biaya Minimum dengan HRS | Granular base | Hot Rolled Sheet (HRS) |
| Bagan Desain 3B | Aspal dengan Lapis Fondasi Berbutir | Granular base | Asphalt Concrete |
| Bagan Desain 3C | Penyesuaian LPA pada BD 3B untuk Tanah Dasar CBR ≥ 7% | Lean Asphalt (LPA) adjustment | Asphalt Concrete |

**Technical Details**:

**Bagan Desain 3** (CTB Option):
- Base: Cement Treated Base (CTB) - 15-20cm
- Surface: AC-WC (Wearing Course) - 4-5cm
- Binder: AC-BC (Binder Course) - 6-7cm
- Cost: Minimum cost option with CTB
- Traffic: Medium to High
- CBR: ≥ 6%

**Bagan Desain 3A** (HRS Option):
- Base: Granular aggregate base - 20-25cm
- Surface: HRS-WC (Hot Rolled Sheet) - 3-4cm
- Binder: HRS-Base - 5-6cm
- Cost: Minimum cost option with HRS
- Traffic: Low to Medium
- CBR: ≥ 5%

**Bagan Desain 3B** (Standard Flexible):
- Base: Granular aggregate base - 20-30cm
- Sub-base: Granular sub-base - 15-20cm
- Surface: AC-WC - 4-5cm
- Binder: AC-BC - 6-7cm
- Traffic: Medium
- CBR: ≥ 3%

**Bagan Desain 3C** (LPA Adjustment):
- Base: Granular with LPA adjustment
- Sub-base: Reduced thickness (CBR ≥ 7%)
- Surface: AC-WC - 4-5cm
- Binder: AC-BC - 6-7cm
- Special: For good subgrade (CBR ≥ 7%)
- Traffic: Medium

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Lentur created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "spec": "Bagan Desain 3",
    "desc": "Bagan Desain 3 : Opsi Biaya Minimum dengan CTB",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create HRS (Hot Rolled Sheet) minimum cost option.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create standard asphalt with granular base layer specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create LPA (Lean Asphalt) adjustment for good subgrade (CBR ≥ 7%).

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create light traffic flexible pavement specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create medium traffic flexible pavement specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan spesifikasi desain lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "spec": string,    // Optional - New spec name
  "desc": string     // Optional - New description
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Lentur updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "spec": "Bagan Desain 3 (Updated)",
    "desc": "Updated description",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan spesifikasi desain lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Lentur deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
